title: Packaging Corporation of America (PKG) CEO Mark Kowlzan on Q1 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: Packaging Corporation of America (NYSE:PKG ) Q1 2022 Earnings Conference Call April 26, 2022 9:00 AM ET Company Participants Mark Kowlzan - Chairman and CEO Thomas Hassfurther - EVP, Corrugated Products Robert Mundy - EVP and CFO Conference Call Participants John Babcock - Bank of America Mark Wilde - Bank of Montreal Mark Weintraub - Seaport Research Partners Anthony Pettinari - Citigroup Cleve Rueckert - UBS Operator Thank you for joining Packaging Corporation of America's First Quarter 2022 Earnings Results Conference Call. Your host today will be Mark Kowlzan, Chairman and Chief Executive Officer of PCA.

title: Packaging Corp. (PKG) Q1 Earnings and Revenues Surpass Estimates
text: Packaging Corp. (PKG) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 7.51% and 3.40%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Packaging Corporation of America Reports First Quarter 2022 Results
text: LAKE FOREST, Ill.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Packaging Corporation of America (NYSE: PKG) today reported first quarter 2022 net income of $254 million, or $2.70 per share, and net income of $256 million, or $2.72 per share, excluding special items. First quarter net sales were $2.1 billion in 2022 and $1.8 billion in 2021.
